message:
Fix glamour table rendering to match Go conformance (bd-1ajh)

The Rust glamour was rendering tables with full bordered boxes while
Go glamour uses minimal internal-only separators. This caused 23 of 84
conformance tests to fail.

Changes:
- Add MINIMAL_BORDER and MINIMAL_ASCII_BORDER constants with empty
  outer edges but internal separators (│ for vertical, ─ for horizontal,
  ┼ or | for cross)
- Add render_minimal_row() to render rows without outer borders
- Add render_minimal_separator() for internal separator lines
- Update flush_table() to use minimal borders and skip top/bottom edges

This reduces glamour conformance failures from 23 to 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
